title: Gender, feminism and religion
summary: 9699 — patriarchy in religion, women clergy, and feminist theology.
learningObjectives: Explain feminist critiques of religious patriarchy.
Analyse women's roles in different faith traditions.
Evaluate reforms: women priests, inclusive language.
Assess whether religion can be feminist.

simpleExplanation.title: Women and faith
simpleExplanation.summary: Many religions have excluded women from leadership and reinforced gender roles, but feminist theology and reform movements challenge this.

sections.content: **Gender and religion** (12.2) links **4.1 feminism** to **11.2 patriarchy**. Avoid sweeping generalisations across faiths.

sections.label: Mark a gender and religion question
